title: Admin Login Visibility and Rupee Currency Display

requirements.summary: Make admin login option clearly visible and accessible on the LoginPage without requiring hidden interactions or URL parameters
acceptanceCriteria: A clearly labeled 'Admin Login' button or tab is visible on the login page without any special URL parameters
Clicking the admin login toggle switches the form to admin mode
Admin login mode is visually distinguishable from user login mode

file_operations.description: Add a prominent toggle or tab control at the top of the login form that allows users to switch between 'User Login' and 'Admin Login' modes. The toggle should be visible by default without any URL parameter checks. Update the UI to clearly indicate which mode is active (e.g., with distinct styling, labels, or tab states). Ensure the mode state is managed in component state and persists visually while the user interacts with the form.

requirements.summary: Display Indian Rupee (₹) currency symbol instead of US Dollar ($) on the LoginPage for any pricing or currency references
acceptanceCriteria: No bare $ symbol appears on the login page
Any currency value displayed uses the ₹ (Indian Rupee) symbol
Currency display is consistent and correctly formatted

file_operations.description: Replace any currency references that use the US Dollar symbol ($) with the Indian Rupee symbol (₹). Review all text, labels, and pricing displays on the page to ensure consistent INR formatting. If no currency references currently exist, this operation ensures future-proofing by adding a comment or constant for currency formatting.

requirements.summary: Ensure login flows correctly persist session state and redirect users appropriately based on their role and profile status
acceptanceCriteria: After a successful user login, authenticated state is preserved and the user is redirected to the correct page
After a successful admin login, the admin is redirected to the admin dashboard
Newly authenticated users without a profile are redirected to the registration page
Refreshing the page after login does not log the user out

file_operations.description: Review and strengthen the post-login redirect logic to ensure it properly handles all three cases: (1) admins redirect to /admin/dashboard, (2) authenticated users with a profile redirect to /dashboard, and (3) authenticated users without a profile redirect to /registration. Ensure that the authentication state (identity and role) is correctly retrieved from useInternetIdentity and that the component waits for both authentication and profile checks to complete before determining the redirect target. Verify that session persistence is handled by the existing useInternetIdentity hook and that no additional session-clearing bugs exist in the login flow.

Review session persistence logic to ensure that authenticated identity is correctly stored and restored across page refreshes. Verify that the identity persists in storage and is rehydrated on app mount. If any issues exist with identity clearing on refresh, fix them to ensure users remain logged in. This file should already handle persistence; verify it is working correctly and add any missing safeguards.
